meta.name: Black Bean Soup
meta.subtitle: Smoky, mildly spiced black bean soup with citrus finish • Panera-style vibe (not a copy)

source.notes: Modeled for a Panera-style flavor profile: smooth + chunky texture, mild smoky spice, tomato + cumin backbone, finished with lime/cilantro. This is an original formulation (not a proprietary copy).

yield.notes: Makes ~14–16 cups depending on blending and simmer.

tasteProfile.notes: Cumin-forward, lightly smoky, tomato-based black bean soup with a smooth-and-chunky texture and bright lime finish.

ingredients.label: Celery, diced (optional)
ingredients.notes: Adds a classic soup base note.

ingredients.label: Red bell pepper, diced
ingredients.notes: About 1 medium. (Green works too; red is sweeter.)

ingredients.label: Black beans, cooked and drained (or canned, drained)
ingredients.notes: Equivalent to ~4 cans (15 oz/425g each) drained, or ~5–6 cups cooked.

ingredients.label: Vegetable broth or chicken broth (low-sodium preferred)
Water (optional, for thinning as needed)
ingredients.notes: Add a splash at a time to reach desired thickness.

ingredients.label: Salt
ingredients.notes: Start with ~1 teaspoon; adjust at the end.

ingredients.label: Lime juice
ingredients.notes: About 1–2 limes, to taste. Key to the 'Panera-style' brightness.

ingredients.label: Sugar or honey (optional, to balance acidity)
ingredients.notes: About 1 teaspoon. Use only if tomatoes feel sharp.

ingredients.label: Plain yogurt or sour cream (optional garnish)
Tortilla chips or toasted pepitas (optional garnish)

steps.title: Sweat vegetables
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onion, bell pepper, and (optional) carrot/celery. Cook 6–8 minutes until softened.
Add garlic and cook 30 seconds until fragrant.

steps.title: Bloom tomato paste and spices
instructions: Stir in tomato paste; cook 1–2 minutes to deepen flavor.
Add cumin, chili powder, smoked paprika (optional), oregano (optional). Stir 30 seconds.

steps.title: Simmer with beans and broth
instructions: Add black beans, broth, bay leaf (optional), salt, and pepper.
Bring to a simmer and cook 20 minutes to meld flavors.

steps.title: Blend for smooth-and-chunky texture
instructions: Blend a portion of the soup to thicken: use an immersion blender for 5–10 seconds bursts, or transfer 2–3 cups to a blender and puree, then return to the pot.
Adjust thickness with a splash of water or broth if needed.

steps.title: Finish with lime and serve
instructions: Stir in lime juice. Taste and adjust salt/pepper.
If the soup tastes sharp, add optional sugar/honey a little at a time.
Serve with optional cilantro and garnishes (yogurt/sour cream, chips/pepitas).

textureControl: For a Panera-style feel: blend about 1/3 to 1/2 of the soup.
For extra smooth: blend more and strain (optional).
For chunky: blend less and simmer 5 minutes more.
smokyNotes: Smoked paprika provides smoky depth without meat.
If not vegetarian, a small amount of cooked bacon or smoked turkey can be added as an optional topping (not required).
heatControl: Keep mild by limiting chili powder and skipping cayenne.
Increase heat with cayenne, hot sauce, or diced jalapeño.
brightnessControl: Lime is essential for the cafe-style brightness; add at the end.
A splash of vinegar can substitute if no lime.

bestPractices: Flavor improves overnight; lime can be added fresh when serving if preferred.

storage.freezer: Freeze up to 3 months. Thaw and reheat gently; add a splash of broth/water if thick.
storage.reheat: Warm to a simmer, stirring. Finish with fresh lime/cilantro if desired.

audit.testNotes: Schema-compliant: schemaVersion+meta present; all ingredients include id+label+amount; all steps include id+title+instructions; no disallowed top-level properties per current recipe.schema.json.
